title: Why did Kaji dupe Misato
wikitext:
[]: Why did Kaji dupe Misato?             Quote Post by Blood Type: Blue » Sat Feb 16, 2013 7:16 am Just curious, why did Kaji deliberately misinform Misatio that the giant in Terminal Dogma was Adam, when he knew it wasnt cause hed just delivered the embryo to Gendo? or was he doing more work for Gendo and as he says before opening Heavens Door and leading Misato down the wrong path?

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sat Feb 16, 2013 7:31 am Someone can correct me if I'm wrong but my understanding is that Kaji actually thought the giant was Adam. When he hands the embryo over to Gendo he remarks at how much it's grown back already, surprised by the speed. I believe the popular theory is he assumed it just continued to grow at an extreme rate and turned into the giant (which is actually Lilith of course). If that's the case then he wasn't lying, he was just wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sat Feb 16, 2013 8:10 am That is correct, CJD.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Feb 16, 2013 10:19 am Because Anno didn't know that yet either, but don't tell anybody

[]:             Quote Post by Atropos » Sat Feb 16, 2013 10:39 am esselfortium wrote: Because Anno didn't know that yet either, but don't tell anybody

[]:             Quote Post by caragnafog dog » Sat Feb 16, 2013 10:49 am Atropos wrote: Yeah, in retrospect it seems that much of what we take for canon was made up post-series. In Kaworu's episode, for example, there's no hint that he was a vessel for Adam - nor any such hint for Rei. I'd imagine that plotline was also developed for the DC. This fits better with the proposal, where Kaworu is just another Angel - not even the final one.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Feb 17, 2013 3:58 am caragnafog dog wrote: But didn't Rei give off the same readings as lillith when she appeared briefly in episode 24?

[]:             Quote Post by caragnafog dog » Sun Feb 17, 2013 7:08 pm would that not be prove in itself tho

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Feb 18, 2013 11:46 am CJD wrote: Someone can correct me if I'm wrong but my understanding is that Kaji actually thought the giant was Adam. When he hands the embryo over to Gendo he remarks at how much it's grown back already, surprised by the speed. I believe the popular theory is he assumed it just continued to grow at an extreme rate and turned into the giant (which is actually Lilith of course). If that's the case then he wasn't lying, he was just wrong.
